description: Versatile layout primitive for organizing page content into distinct horizontal blocks. Provides configurable vertical spacing (margins), inner padding, background shading, and max-width sizing constraints. Use for page sections, hero blocks, and content separators.

data-section.agent_hint: Activates the section layout. Bare attribute, no value needed.

data-spacing.agent_hint: External vertical margin-block. Controls whitespace between sibling sections. lg/xl for major page breaks, sm/xs for tight groupings.

data-padding.agent_hint: Internal block padding (top and bottom). Controls inner breathing room.

data-size.agent_hint: Max-width constraint. sm=640px, md=960px, lg=1200px, xl=1440px, full=100%. Centers the section inline.

data-bg.agent_hint: Background fill. raised for card-like sections, primary for accent areas, gradient for hero sections.

content.agent_hint: Any content block within the section. Use data-stack or data-grid for inner layout.

do: Use data-spacing=lg between major page sections for visual breathing room
Use data-size=md or data-size=lg to constrain reading width on wide screens
Combine data-bg=gradient with a heading and CTA for hero areas
Stack multiple sections vertically for long-form page layouts
Use data-bg=raised with data-border for card-style section blocks
dont: Do not set margin-block or padding-block via inline styles
Do not use section inside another section — use nested data-box or data-stack instead
Do not use data-section for sidebar panels — use data-box instead

examples.label: Hero section with gradient background
examples.emmet: section[data-section data-spacing=xl data-padding=xl data-bg=gradient data-size=full]>h1{Build Faster}+p{A modern design system for the web}+button[data-intent=primary]{Get Started}
examples.html:
Build Faster

A modern design system for the web

examples.label: Constrained content section
examples.emmet: section[data-section data-spacing=lg data-padding=md data-size=md data-bg=raised]>h2{About Us}+p{We build products that people love.}
examples.html:
About Us

We build products that people love.

examples.label: Muted info strip
examples.emmet: section[data-section data-spacing=sm data-padding=sm data-bg=muted]>p{📢 New features available — see the changelog}
examples.html: 📢 New features available — see the changelog
